creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
It has this version installed:
pkg info |grep omniauth
rubygem-gitlab-omniauth-openid-connect-0.9.1 OpenID Connect Strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-gitlab_omniauth-ldap-2.1.1_1 LDAP strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-2.1.0         Generalized Rack framework for multiple-provider authentication
rubygem-omniauth-alicloud-1.0.1_1 Wrapper the AliCloud Oauth2 API
rubygem-omniauth-atlassian-oauth2-0.2.0_1 Atlassian OAuth2 strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-auth0-2.0.0   Authentication broker supporting different identity providers
rubygem-omniauth-authentiq-0.3.3_1 Authentiq OAuth2 Strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-azure-activedirectory-v2-1.0.0 OAuth 2 authentication with the Azure ActiveDirectory V2 API
rubygem-omniauth-azure-oauth2-0.0.10_1 Azure OAuth2 Strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-cas3-1.1.4_1  CAS 3.0 Strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-dingtalk-oauth2-1.0.1 Wrapper the DingTalk Oauth2 API
rubygem-omniauth-facebook4-4.0.0 Facebook OAuth2 Strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-github-1.4.0_1 Official OmniAuth strategy for GitHub
rubygem-omniauth-gitlab-1.0.4_1 OmniAuth strategy for GitLab
rubygem-omniauth-google-oauth2-0.6.0_1 Google OAuth2 strategy for OmniAuth 1.x
rubygem-omniauth-oauth-1.2.0   Generic OAuth strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-oauth2-1.8.0  Abstract OAuth2 strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-oauth2-generic-0.2.8 Generic, Configurable OmniAuth Strategy for OAuth2 providers
rubygem-omniauth-oauth2-v1-1.7.3 Abstract OAuth2 strategy for OmniAuth
rubygem-omniauth-salesforce-1.0.5_1 OmniAuth strategy for salesforce.com
rubygem-omniauth-saml-1.10.3   OmniAuth strategy for SAML
rubygem-omniauth-shibboleth-1.3.0_1 OmniAuth Shibboleth strategies for OmniAuth 1.x
rubygem-omniauth-twitter-1.4.0 OmniAuth strategy for Twitter
rubygem-omniauth-ultraauth-0.0.2 Passwordless authentication plugin
rubygem-omniauth1-1.9.1        Generalized Rack framework for multiple-provider authentication
rubygem-omniauth_crowd-2.4.0_3 OmniAuth provider for Atlassian Crowds REST API
rubygem-omniauth_openid_connect-0.3.5_1 OpenID Connect Strategy for OmniAuth
